death.attack.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_explo: %s was destroyed by detonating bee poison
%s was terminated by the detonated bee poison in a battle with %s
death.attack.tuanzis_mod.chain_pain: %s was crushed by the overflow pain shockwave
death.attack.tuanzis_mod.tearing: %s bled to death from torn wounds
gui.tuanzis_mod.travelers_notebook.empty: Please put bound Signpost Runes inside the storage to mark destinations.
gui.tuanzis_mod.travelers_notebook.selec: Select a bound Signpost Rune on the left to begin teleportation.
item.minecraft.warden_spawn_egg.jei.desc:
[Warden]
An extremely dangerous creature that typically lurks within the Ancient Cities of the Deep Dark.

§eReward Boost:§r
1. §bXP Increase§r: Now drops §a275§r experience points when killed by a player or a tamed wolf (was 5).
2. §bRare Drop§r: If a player deals more than §c50%§r of its max health as damage, it has a §a10%§r chance to drop a §6Soulbound§r enchanted book (affected by Looting, +2.5% per level).

§7Tip: Even with the increased reward, it remains highly dangerous. Prepare thoroughly before engaging.§r
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.desc.1: §7The blade is as thin as a cicada's wing, showing a translucent amber-gold color with a dense hexagonal grid pattern. Gold trail left in midair.
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.desc.2: §7Amber-gold fades to opaque honey color. Hexagonal blade pattern has some breaks, guard wing has radial cracks.
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.desc.3: §7The blade shows a matte old-honey color, overall dim. The blade edge has tiny jagged notches, one guard wing is perforated.
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.desc.4: §7Opaque dark brown color. The blade surface is full of weathered pores. Blade patterns completely disappear, replaced by unordered cracks.
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.desc.5: §7The blade is charred black, covered in blue-purple burn stains. The blade is full of holes, and the guard is just charred frames.
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.lore.1: §8In the legend of a forgotten bee-whisperer, this blade was forged from the queen bee's last stinger.
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.lore.2: §8When the hive fell and the colony died, the queen injected her unspent sting into a piece of common iron.
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.lore.3: §8Every wielder feels a slight constant vibration in their palm—not the sword shaking, but it following the ancient rhythm.
item.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.lore.4: §8It drags opponents into a rhythm of endless pain in high-speed clashes, until they find too many wounds to bandage.
item.tuanzis_mod.berserk_charm.tooltip: Place in off-hand to activate automatically when health falls below 30%. Grants Strength II and Speed II for 15 seconds, and consumes one charm.
item.tuanzis_mod.immortal_talisman.toolt: Retain all items and experience on death while in inventory.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.desc.1: §7The blade is as clear as deep-space crystal, with a slow-flowing cyan nebula mist inside. Crystallized echo fragments on the guard glow softly with white-blue pulses.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.desc.2: §7Fine silver hairline cracks appear on the transparent blade, slightly dimming its luster. The nebula flows faster and irregularly. Tiny dark spots appear on the guard fragments.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.desc.3: §7Internal cracks interweave into a web. Dark purple turbulence mixes into the cyan mist. Guard pulses are dim, irregular, and briefly turn off.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.desc.4: §7The blade is cloudy and black, with only small teal cracks still glowing. Guard fragments are broken at the edges, and corrosion spreads like mold.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.desc.5: §7The blade is almost entirely covered by dark fissures, with only thread-like glow lines left. The guard is heavily ruined, and its glow has vanished.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.lore.1: §8Forged from deep sculk core fragments and crystallized echo remnants found in the deep dark.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.lore.2: §8It captures and amplifies micro-vibrations in the air, creating an indelible resonance with the target's soul.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.lore.3: §8When the resonance breaks, the pent-up sonic waves tear through enemy defenses in a sudden supersonic burst.
item.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.lore.4: §8However, the sculk energy ruthlessly corrodes the blade, leaving only a silent remnant.
item.tuanzis_mod.soul_merchant_station.t: Right-click to place. Import a villager for AI-free high-TPS trading.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.desc.1: §7The blade exhibits a perfect gradient from deep-sea cobalt to shallow-sea teal, with shifting pearlescent luster. The Heart of the Sea in the guard is full and clear, liquid energy waxing and waning smoothly. No scratches on the blade.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.desc.2: §7Tiny signs of wear appear at the blade edge. The gradient color softens and pearlescence decreases. The Heart of the Sea is still full, but tiny dark ripple marks appear occasionally.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.desc.3: §7Visible scratches appear on the blade, and the edge is slightly rolled. The overall tone shifts to gray-blue, eroded by undercurrents. Flocculent turbidity appears inside the Heart of the Sea, disrupting energy flow.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.desc.4: §7Fissures expand on the blade, with chipped edges. The gradient coat peels off significantly, exposing dark metal underneath. The Heart of the Sea surface cracks, and energy leaks as faint sparks.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.desc.5: §7Severe structural fractures across the blade, held together only by residual magic. The Heart of the Sea is completely dim, almost static, leaving only a tiny spark of light.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.lore.1: §8Condenses the tide power under full moon and the heart of the abyss.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.lore.2: §8Every swing flows like the tide, following an unspeakable rhythm.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.lore.3: §8Attack in perfect beat, and the surging waves will breach enemy lines.
item.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.lore.4: §8But if the rhythm breaks, the out-of-control currents will backlash and ruin the blade.
item.tuanzis_mod.wolf_command.tooltip: Equip in off-hand to grant tamed wolves bonus health, tearing attacks, and death protection.
item.tuanzis_mod.yuris_revenge.jei.descr:
[Yuri's Revenge]
A tool imbued with mysterious power, capable of shattering indestructible bedrock at unprecedented speeds.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bBedrock Breaker§r: The only tool that can mine and drop bedrock.
2. §bExtreme Speed§r: Amazing destruction speed when facing bedrock.

§7Note: It is nearly useless against any block other than bedrock.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.abyssal_rhythm.descripti:
[Abyssal Rhythm Enchantment]
A general combat enchantment applicable to Swords. Resonates with tide energy to deal extra magic damage!

§eEffects:§r
1. §bAbyssal Strike§r: Each melee attack hit on a target with an enchanted sword triggers Abyssal Rhythm, dealing extra magic damage to the primary target. No cooldown.
2. §bDamage Calculations§r:
   Extra Damage = Base Damage + Tide Resonance Bonus
   §aBase Damage§r: Based on Level (0.1 for I, 0.2 for II, 0.25 for III, 0.3 for IV).
   §aTide Resonance Bonus§r: Active only when holding Tide Charge layers (from Tide Cleaver). Bonus = 0.05 × Level × current layers.
   At 5 layers, the resonance bonus for Level IV provides an extra 1.0 damage!

§eAcquisition:§r
Max Level IV. General sword enchantment, compatible with other damage enchantments.
jei.tuanzis_mod.adrenaline_potion.descri:
[Potion of Adrenaline]
A powerful potion that instantly unleashes potential, boosting attack speed and movement speed at the cost of a severe overdraw backlash.

§eDrink Effects:§r
1. §bExtreme Boost:§r Attack Speed is increased by §a15% * Level§r, and Movement Speed is increased by §a7.5% * Level§r.
2. §bDurability:§r Normal version lasts 45 seconds, Strong (II) version lasts 30 seconds, and Extended version lasts 1 min 30 seconds.

§eOverdraw & Penalties:§r
1. §bMilk Immunity:§r The overdraw effect §ecannot be cleared by milk§r. If it remains when the Adrenaline buff ends, the overdraw side effects are triggered.
2. §bSide Effects:§r Grants §c30 seconds of Weakness I + Mining Fatigue I§r per overdraw level.
3. §bStacking Rule:§r Drinking while overdrawn §6stacks both the overdraw level and its duration§r. Each additional drink raises the overdraw level by 1 (max level IV), and the final side effect duration stacks linearly (30s for Level I, 60s for II, 90s for III, 120s for IV).
jei.tuanzis_mod.bee_sting_echo.descripti: A thin blade forged from the queen bee's last stinger. Extremely fast attack speed and poison accumulation.
jei.tuanzis_mod.berserk_charm.descriptio:
[Berserk Charm]
A special charm that unleashes potential power under extreme conditions.

§eTrigger Conditions:§r
1. Must be equipped in the §boff-hand§r.
2. Player health falls below §c30%§r.

§eActivation Effects:§r
1. Consumes §e1§r charm.
2. Grants §6Strength II§r and §bSpeed II§r for 15 seconds.
3. Enters a §e15-second cooldown§r to prevent multiple charms from being consumed rapidly if health remains low.
jei.tuanzis_mod.berserker.description:
[Berserker Enchantment]
Convert your near-death crisis into a devastating counter-attack.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bDesperate Rage§r: When wearing the enchanted chestplate, melee attack damage is boosted based on the proportion of lost health. For every 10% max health lost, melee damage increases by §a5% (Level I)§r or §a8% (Level II)§r. The boost reaches its cap when health falls below §c5%§r.
2. §bReal-time Adjustment§r: When health is restored by healing, the damage bonus decreases in real-time.

§eCost & Penalties:§r
1. §bArmor Collapse§r: As a penalty, the chestplate's base armor value is reduced by §c35% (Level I)§r or §c30% (Level II)§r (meaning the chestplate still retains 65% or 70% of its base armor value. For example, a Diamond Chestplate with 8 base armor will only lose 2 points under Level II, still providing 6 armor points, instead of being reduced to only 30%).
2. §bExclusion§r: Mutually exclusive with all protection enchantments including §bProtection§r, §bFire Protection§r, §bBlast Protection§r, §bProjectile Protection§r, and §bFeather Falling§r.

§7Acquisition: Max level II. Obtainable via Enchanting Table (rare), random loot, or Villager trades.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.blood_rage.description:
[Blood Rage Enchantment]
Turn battle frenzy into sheer destructive power. A truly double-edged sword.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bKill Outbreak§r: Killing any mob grants "Blood Rage" buff for §e7 seconds§r.
2. §bDamage Surge§r: During Blood Rage, player's attack damage is boosted by §a40%§r (multiplicative).

§eCost & Backlash:§r
1. §bDefense Collapse§r: During Blood Rage, all incoming damage is increased by §c30%§r (multiplicative).
2. §bFateful Backlash§r: If no mobs are killed within 7 seconds to refresh the timer, natural expiration inflicts §c2 damage (1 heart)§r that bypasses armor and Protection enchantments.
3. §bExclusion§r: Mutually exclusive with §bFire Aspect§r, but perfectly compatible with §bSharpness§r, §bSmite§r, and §bBane of Arthropods§r.

§7Acquisition: Max level I. Obtainable via Enchanting Table, random loot, or Villager trades.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.buzzing_rhythm.descripti:
[Buzzing Rhythm Enchantment]
A rare combat enchantment applicable to Swords. Drastically boosts attack damage through rhythmic consecutive hits!

§eEffects:§r
1. §bRhythm Boost§r: When attacking a target with "Bee Poison" or "Bee Poison Cooldown" consecutively with this enchanted weapon, gains one stack of "Rhythm" per hit, lasting for 3 seconds, up to 1 + level (max 5) stacks. Each stack grants a §a+3%§r bonus to attack damage (max +15% attack damage).
2. §bExpiration§r: If no hit is scored on the same target within 3 seconds, the stacks instantly clear.
3. §bReach Distance§r: Each level increases your entity interaction reach distance by §b0.0625 blocks§r (max 0.25 blocks).

§eExclusion & Limits:§r
Mutually exclusive with §bSweeping Edge§r, §bFire Aspect§r, and §bKnockback§r.
jei.tuanzis_mod.chain_mining.description:
[Chain Mining Enchantment]
Hold the activation key while mining a block to instantly mine surrounding connected blocks of the same type.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bVein Mining§r: Break a block to automatically break connected identical blocks and drop items normally.
2. §bMining Limits§r: Level I mines up to 16 blocks, Level II up to 32, Level III up to 48, Level IV up to 64.

§eConstraints & Penalties:§r
1. §bDurability Cost§r: Each mined block consumes tool durability normally. If the tool breaks during chain mining, the chain will immediately and safely stop.
2. §bHunger Cost§r: Each extra block mined adds §c0.25§r exhaustion. The exhaustion is accumulated and applied instantly to deduct your saturation and food level.

§7Acquisition: Currently unavailable in survival mode; obtain via Creative Mode only.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.chain_pain.description:
[Chain Pain Enchantment]
A rare, treasure-grade combat enchantment exclusively for Axes. Directs the excess pain from a kill into a devastating shockwave chaining to nearby enemies!

§eEffects:§r
Killing any target with this Axe calculates the overflow damage (final blow damage minus target's health prior to the blow), dealing §c50%§r of this excess damage to all other enemies within §a5 blocks§r.
1. Chaining automatically targets up to §e5 entities§r, sorted and damaged from nearest to furthest.
2. Ideal for sweeping groups of monsters instantly after executing a single target.

§eConstraints & Restrictions:§r
1. §bNo Recursion§r: Chained splash damage will never trigger the chain pain effect recursively.
2. §bTreasure Hunt§r: Cannot be obtained via the Enchanting Table or Librarian trades. Found only in loot chests in dungeons or fortresses.
3. §bExclusion§r: Mutually exclusive with §bSilk Touch§r.
jei.tuanzis_mod.compatibility.infinity_m:
[Enchantment Compatibility]
§bInfinity§r and §bMending§r are now compatible and can be applied to the same bow simultaneously.
jei.tuanzis_mod.decoy_totem.description:
[Decoy Totem]
An extremely powerful strategic defense tool. Perfect for drawing enemy attention, creating safe windows for combat or escape.

§eEffects & Mechanics:§r
1. §bPhantom Spawn§r: Generates a player phantom lasting §e15 seconds§r, drawing agro from all mobs within §a10 blocks§r.
2. §bPerfect Disguise§r: The phantom looks exactly like the player (skin, armor, and held items).
3. §bData Inheritance§r: Inherits player's health and armor value at the moment of spawn.
4. §bLifelike Behavior§r: Randomly walks, runs, and jumps. Upon taking damage, it instantly panics and sprints away with big jumps, fleeing the damage source!
5. §bShatter Revenge§r: Drops nothing on death but shatters with a clay pot sound. It enrages mobs within §a10 blocks§r, granting them §cSpeed II§r for §e10 seconds§r.

§eAcquisition:§r
1. §bShaped Crafting§r: Top [Empty, Sculk Vein, Empty], Middle [Phantom Membrane, Scarecrow, Phantom Membrane], Bottom [Glowstone, Redstone, Glowstone].

§7Note: Spawning triggers a §c15-second§r item cooldown.
jei.tuanzis_mod.echo_breaker.description:
[Echo Breaker]
An ultimate defensive weapon forged using a Warden Heart and Echo Shards. It holds the mysterious power to resist and even deflect sonic damage.

§ePassive Effects:§r
1. §bSonic Absorption:§r Effective only when held in the main hand. Automatically §areduces Sonic Boom damage by 30%§r.

§eActive Effects (Right-click):§r
1. §bRestrictions:§r Right-click block can only be used when the §coffhand is empty§r.
2. §bPerfect Block:§r Right-click to block for §e0.5 seconds§r. During blocking, grants §a100% immunity to Sonic Boom damage§r.
3. §bSonic Deflection:§r Blocking a Sonic Boom perfectly deflects the sound wave back to its source, dealing §c15 true damage§r and applying §9strong knockback§r.
4. §bDurability Cost:§r Each successful block consumes an extra §c3 durability points§r.
5. §bCooldown Mechanics:§r Triggers a §c5.0-second§r cooldown on §cfailure§r (no damage blocked); triggers an §a8.0-second§r cooldown on §asuccess§r (perfectly deflected).

§eRepair & Maintenance:§r
Can be repaired in an anvil using a §bWarden Heart§r.
jei.tuanzis_mod.execute.description:
[Execute Enchantment]
A powerful combat enchantment applicable to Swords and Axes. Unleash chaotic bloodlust to execute low-health targets!

§eEffects:§r
Triggers when the target's current health percentage falls below a specified threshold, providing a massive multiplier to your melee damage!
1. §aLevel I§r: Triggers below §e15%§r health, deals §a+25%§r melee damage.
2. §aLevel II§r: Triggers below §e25%§r health, deals §a+50%§r melee damage.
3. §aLevel III§r: Triggers below §e35%§r health, deals §a+75%§r melee damage.

§cBacklash Penalty - Bloodlust Backlash:§r
1. Each time the execute damage boost is triggered, you will instantly take:
   §cLevel * 1 point of true damage (Level I: 1, Level II: 2, Level III: 3)§r.
2. This backlash is true damage, ignoring all armor, and cannot be mitigated by any resistance or absorption effects! Highly lethal!

§eExclusion & Limits:§r
Mutually exclusive with §bSharpness§r, §bSmite§r, and §bBane of Arthropods§r.
jei.tuanzis_mod.experience.description:
[Experience Enchantment]
Increases the experience points gained from killing mobs.

§eEffects:§r
1. §bXP Boost§r: Each level increases experience gain by §a25%§r (rounded up).
2. §bCondition§r: Only effective when killing mobs with the enchanted weapon in the main hand.
3. §bScope§r: Effective against all mobs except players.

§7Note: Max level is 4. Level 30 enchantment table can yield up to level 3. Level 4 requires anvil merging or special loot.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.immortal_talisman.descri:
[Immortal Talisman]
A life-saving artifact. As long as it's in your inventory, death is no longer the end.

§eEffects:§r
1. §bKeep Inventory§r: Retain all items, armor, and experience upon death.
2. §bSelf-Sacrifice§r: One talisman is consumed each time it saves you.

§cWarning: If all talismans are consumed, death protection will fail!§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.nether_stew.description:
[Nether Stew]
A demonic, spicy stew distilled from Hellfire crimson and warped funguses. Stackable up to 64, returns an empty bowl after eating. Consuming grants the player three double-edged status effects lasting 1 min 30 seconds:

§ePositive Effect - Hell Fire:§r
1. Grants complete immunity to fire and lava damage.
2. Melee attacks have a 60% chance to ignite the target for 2s.
3. Dealing melee damage to burning targets gains a flat +1 damage bonus.

§cNegative Effect 1 - Blazing Hunger:§r
Doubles the depletion speed of the player's hunger and saturation.

§cNegative Effect 2 - Hydrophobia:§r
1. Makes the player extremely afraid of water. Takes 2 damage per 1s while in water or rain.
2. This damage is true damage, ignoring all armor, and cannot be mitigated by any resistance or absorption effects!
jei.tuanzis_mod.rainbow_sponge.descripti:
[Rainbow Sponge: Advanced Customization Guide]
The sponge acts as a 'Command Card'. Program it via Anvil naming, then merge with an item to apply styles.

§n1. Programming Syntax (Naming)§r
1. §bHex Colors§r: '#RRGGBB' (e.g. #FF5555). [Cost: 8]
2. §bVanilla Styles§r: '&L' (e.g. &l Bold, &o Italic). [Cost: +4 per code]
3. §bSplitting System§r: Use ',' (e.g. &c,&b). Styles apply char-by-char. [Cost: +2 per ',']
4. §bSmart Gradient§r: '&qN#Start-#End'. N=Length. End optional. Smooth shift. [Cost: 8 per char]
§7Note: Gradient codes (&q) show plain text; others show real color as demo.§r

§n2. Applying Styles (Merging)§r
1. §eNormal/Style Merge§r: 32 base + (Styles*16 + Commas*8).
2. §eGradient Merge§r: 32 per character.
3. §eReset Styles§r: Merge '&r' sponge to clear item's custom colors. [Cost: 16]
jei.tuanzis_mod.resonance_pulse.descript: Enchantment for swords. Grants a chance to apply Resonance on hit, and triggers a sonic boom dealing armor-penetrating damage to nearby enemies when attacking a resonated target.
jei.tuanzis_mod.scarecrow.description:
[Scarecrow]
A decorative item, also serving as the core component to craft the advanced defensive item — §bDecoy Totem§r.

§eAcquisition:§r
1. §bShapeless Crafting§r: Crafted using 1 Hay Block, 1 Stick, and 1 Carved Pumpkin.
jei.tuanzis_mod.scully_shard.description: A sculk-energy blade from the deep dark. Deals extra armor-penetrating sonic damage to resonated targets. Even when worn down to a Silent Remnant (Stage V), it remains fully functional without breaking.
jei.tuanzis_mod.seeking_arrow.descriptio:
[Seeking Arrow Enchantment]
A treasure-grade enchantment exclusively for Crossbows. Imbues fired arrows with unique projectile self-correction capabilities.

§eEffects:§r
1. §bTarget Highlighting§r: While holding a loaded Seeking Arrow crossbow, the targeted living entity glows brightly (glowing outline is visible only to the shooter in client-side).
2. §bTrajectory Correction§r: Once fired, after 0.5 seconds (10 ticks), the arrow performs a one-time trajectory self-correction (up to 30 degrees) towards either the highlighted entity or the target coordinates. Prioritizes entities!

§eConstraints & Restrictions:§r
1. §bOne-time Correction§r: Each arrow corrects its trajectory exactly once; it cannot perform large sweeping turns in mid-air.
2. §bMovement Prediction§r: Features movement prediction logic based on the target's current velocity (extrapolating its position 0.5 seconds later), but does not track acceleration or change in direction (if the target changes direction after correction, the arrow will still miss).
3. §bMutual Exclusion§r: Incompatible with §bMultishot§r.

§7Acquisition: A "Treasure Enchantment". Cannot be obtained via the Enchanting Table or Librarian trades. Found only in loot chests in dungeons or fortresses.
jei.tuanzis_mod.shuriken.description:
[Shuriken]
A lightweight and extremely fast ranged throwing weapon.

§eSpecial Throwing:§r
1. §bRapid Normal Throw§r: Deals 2 damage. Flying speed is 1.5 times that of an arrow without any gravity drop. Single right-click has a 0.2s throwing cooldown.
2. §bSneak Fan-Out Burst§r: Hold Sneak (Shift) + Right-click to consume 3 shurikens and launch 3 shurikens in a forward fan arc. Each shuriken calculates damage independently. Triggers a 0.6s overall cooldown after the burst.

§eShuriken Stuck Status Effect:§r
1. §bMovement Penalty§r: Hits have a 20% chance to apply the "Shuriken Stuck" debuff. Each stuck shuriken reduces movement speed by -10%, stacking up to 3 times (max -30% speed).
2. §bDuration Refresh§r: Hitting the target again refreshes the duration of all currently stuck shurikens back to 8 seconds.
3. §bItem Drop§r: If not refreshed within 8s, stuck shurikens automatically detach and drop at the target's feet as collectible items.
4. §bPVP Counterplay§r: When a player is stuck, taking damage has a 15% chance, and swinging a weapon has a 10% chance to shake off 1 shuriken prematurely.
jei.tuanzis_mod.signpost_rune.descriptio:
[Signpost Rune]
A runic slate used to lock and store dimensional coordinate data.

§eUsage:§r
1. §bBinding Locations§r: Right-click while holding it anywhere in the world to bind the current location and dimension. Plays a ringing chime sound.
2. §bCustom Naming§r: You can rename bound runes in an §bAnvil§r. The custom name will be displayed in the §bTraveler's Notebook§r destination list.

§7Note: Runes are non-stackable. Only bound runes can be placed in the notebook's destination slots.
jei.tuanzis_mod.smelting.description:
[Smelting Enchantment]
Skip the hassle of returning home to use a furnace. When mining blocks that can be smelted, it directly drops the smelted result.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bAuto-Smelt§r: Directly drops products when mining ores, logs, or other smeltable blocks.
2. §bFull Compatibility§r: Perfectly compatible with §bFortune§r, allowing for increased drops.

§eConstraints & Penalties:§r
1. §bMutual Exclusion§r: Incompatible with §bSilk Touch§r.
2. §bDurability Cost§r: Each smeltable block mined consumes §c1§r extra durability (total 2).

§7Acquisition: Cannot be obtained from the enchantment table. A "Treasure Enchantment" found only in Nether Fortress/Desert Temple chests or through high-level Librarian trades (rare, 40-64 emeralds).
jei.tuanzis_mod.soul_merchant_station.de:
[Soul Merchant Station]
A revolutionary AI-free, non-entity villager trading device. Highly optimizes server FPS/TPS while fully retains vanilla trading.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bVillager Import§r: Right-click with a filled §bVillager Cage§r to import the villager. Consumes the cage, displaying a 3D rotating profession icon inside the cage.
2. §bVillager Export§r: Sneak + Right-click with an §cempty Villager Cage§r to securely package the villager back, keeping the station intact.
3. §bAI-Free Trading§r: Right-clicking opens the standard trading GUI. Experience, leveling, and trade locks are fully functional. The villager is 100% safe from harm.
4. §bAuto-Restock§r: At dawn or waking up, if a matching, §bunoccupied job site block§r is adjacent (6 directions) to the station, locked trades will automatically restock.
5. §bNaming Support§r: Use a §bName Tag§r on the station to rename it; the name appears at the top of the trading GUI.
6. §bBlast Immunity§r: The block is completely immune to blast damages, offering permanent safety to the villager.
jei.tuanzis_mod.teleportation_paper.desc:
[Teleportation Paper]
A parchment infused with faint Ender energy.

§eUsage:§r
Used solely as fuel. Place it in the fuel slot (Slot 0) of the §bTraveler's Notebook§r storage; it will be consumed to charge the notebook when the GUI is closed.
jei.tuanzis_mod.tide_cleaver.description:
【Tide Cleaver】
An exotic weapon condensed with ocean energy, featuring a unique "Tide Beat" passive and wear mechanism.

§eTide Beat:§r
1. §bOn-Beat Window§r: Attack cooldown is between §a80% and 100%§r, or within §e0.2 seconds (4 ticks)§r after fully charged. Attacking during this window is an "On-Beat Attack", granting 1 layer of Tide Charge (up to 5), each layer providing §a+2% Melee Damage§r.
2. §bOff-Beat Attack§r: Attacking when cooldown is below §c80%§r reduces damage by §c15%§r and loses 1 layer of charge.
3. §bNormal Attack§r: Attacking more than 0.2 seconds after fully charged has no damage modifier and does not change charge layers.

§ePassive Effects:§r
1. §bTide Erosion§r: When holding §a>= 2 layers§r of charge, melee attacks apply Tide Erosion to the target for 2 seconds, dealing §c1 magic damage per second§r.
2. §bSurging Burst§r: Upon reaching 5 layers of charge, the next On-Beat Attack deals §c3.0 armor-penetrating magic damage§r, resetting charge to 1. Cooldown: §e7 seconds§r.

§eRepair & Maintenance:§r
Can be repaired with the §bHeart of the Sea§r in an anvil.
jei.tuanzis_mod.travelers_notebook.descr:
[Traveler's Notebook]
A notebook woven from void energy that allows players to teleport across coordinates.

§eUsage:§r
1. §bRight-click§r: Open book-style teleport interface. Select a bound rune and press teleport.
2. §bSneak + Right-click§r: Open internal storage (3x9, 27 slots).

§eCharging & Storage:§r
1. The very first slot (Slot 0) is reserved for §eFuel§r. Place §bTeleportation Paper§r inside; it automatically consumes them on GUI close to charge the notebook. 1 paper = 1 energy point, cap 64.
2. The remaining 26 slots only accept bound §bSignpost Runes§r.
3. The notebook cannot be enchanted or repaired.

§eTeleport Rules:§r
1. §bIntra-dimension§r teleport costs §a1§r energy. §bCross-dimension§r teleport costs §a2§r energy.
2. Teleportation requires §e3s channelling§r. Taking damage or moving will cancel the teleport.
3. Intradimension cooldown is 3s. Crossdimension cooldown is 5s.

§cWarning:§r
If the notebook entity is destroyed in the world (e.g. lava, fire, explosion), all stored contents will drop!
jei.tuanzis_mod.trial_dummy.description:
[Trial Dummy]
A highly specialized helper tool used for testing damage output and DPS.

§eRules:§r
1. §bPlacement§r: Right-click to place on a solid block. Max 1 per player within a 10-block radius (placing a 2nd instantly recovers the 1st without durability loss).
2. §bRecovery§r: Shift + Right-click with empty hand to recover. Consumes 1 durability. Drop rate on zero durability: 0-2 sticks and 1 hay block. All worn armors safely drop on recovery!
3. §bInvulnerability & Armor Inheritance§r: Immune to all environment damages (except Creative Player instant break). Right-click with any armor/weapon to swap and dress it. The dummy inherits all armor values, toughness, protection enchantments, and active effects to simulate a 100% real combat defense!
4. §bWeapon & Projectile Protection§r: Attacking doesn't consume weapon durability or arrows.
5. §bDPS Testing§r: Floating damage indicators, action bar real-time stats (Total Damage | DPS). Auto-archive on 4s idle. Right-click with empty hand to print ultra-detailed statistics in chat!
jei.tuanzis_mod.villager_cage.descriptio:
[Villager Cage]
A mystical imprisonment device that seals a villager inside for cross-dimensional transport.

§eCatching a Villager:§r
1. Hold the cage in your §bmain hand§r and §bright-click a villager§r to capture it. Plays a soul sand sound with Ender particles.
2. All villager data (profession/level/trades/name) is fully saved. The cage is §cdestroyed after use§r (one-time item).
3. §cWarning§r: If an Iron Golem is actively protecting the villager, capturing it will make all Golems within §c16 blocks§r hostile!

§eReleasing a Villager:§r
1. §bSneak + Right-click§r a solid block surface to release. The villager spawns above the block with all data intact.
2. The cage is consumed on release. If the target location has no solid ground or no space, release is denied with a message.
3. An empty cage does nothing when sneaking and right-clicking.

§eSpecial Notes:§r
1. §bCross-dimensional transport§r: Villager data is stored in the item; release in any dimension.
2. Trade lock state is preserved, but bed and job site bindings are cleared (must re-establish).

§eCrafting:§r
Iron Ingot, Emerald Block, Iron Ingot
Iron Ingot, Soul Sand, Iron Ingot
Iron Ingot, Iron Ingot, Iron Ingot
jei.tuanzis_mod.warden_heart.description:
[Warden Heart]
A core material obtained from defeating the Warden, containing its resilient life force and sonic energy.

§eAcquisition:§r
1. §bRare Drop:§r Defeating a Warden has a §a25%§r chance to drop it (affected by Looting, +10% probability per level).

§eUsage:§r
1. §bCrafting Ingredient:§r Combine with 3 §bEcho Shards§r and 1 §bStick§r to craft the powerful defensive weapon — §6Echo Breaker§r.
2. §bEquipment Repair:§r Can be used to repair the §6Echo Breaker§r in an anvil.
jei.tuanzis_mod.wolf_command.description:
[Wolf Command]
A charm that bestows infinite power and vitality to tamed wolves.

§eEquipped Effects (Must be in off-hand):§r
1. §bHealth Boost§r: All your tamed wolves gain an extra §a+4§r max health.
2. §bTearing Claws§r: Wolves' attacks have a §a15%§r chance to inflict the §cTearing§r status effect for 8 seconds. If the target is already torn, refreshes the duration and increases the effect level by 1 (up to level 4).
3. §bUndying Battle-will§r: Tamed wolves will not die upon taking fatal damage. Instead, they enter a §e5-second invulnerable rage mode§r (attack frequency doubled, movement and attack damage boosted), and then collapse while consuming 1 durability point of the charm.

§eDowned State:§r
The downed wolf cannot move, cannot attack, is immune to all environmental/normal damage, and cannot be leashed. Feed it §eRotten Flesh 10 times§r to fully revive it with full health!

§eStatus Effect - Tearing:§r
Ticks every 0.5s (10 ticks). If the entity moves during this tick, it takes §c0.5 * Level§r magic damage; otherwise, nothing happens.

§cNote: The charm cannot be repaired. Maximum durability is 3, maximum stack size is 1.§r
message.tuanzis_mod.soul_merchant_statio: §cThis station already has a resident villager!
§cNo villager currently residing in this station!
message.tuanzis_mod.trial_dummy.no_tests: §6[Trial Dummy] No testing data found. Strike the dummy to start.
message.tuanzis_mod.trial_dummy.reset: §c[Trial Dummy] Session ended. DPS stats archived and reset.
message.tuanzis_mod.villager_cage.golem_: §cNearby protecting Iron Golems are now hostile!
message.tuanzis_mod.villager_cage.need_s: §cRequires a solid block surface to release the villager!
